hadith:words-beloved.arabic: أَحَبُّ الْكَلَامِ إِلَى اللَّهِ أَرْبَعٌ: سُبْحَانَ اللَّهِ، وَالْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ، وَلَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا اللَّهُ، وَاللهُ أَكْبَرُ
hadith:words-beloved.english: The most beloved words to Allah are four: SubhanAllah, Alhamdulillah, La ilaha illallah, Allahu Akbar.
hadith:words-beloved.score_notes: Bridges both roots — la ilaha illa Allah and Allahu Akbar together. Dropped when hadith section removed in v2.

hadith:kibr-atom.arabic: لَا يَدْخُلُ الْجَنَّةَ مَنْ كَانَ فِي قَلْبِهِ مِثْقَالُ ذَرَّةٍ مِنْ كِبْرٍ
hadith:kibr-atom.english: No one will enter Paradise who has an atom's weight of arrogance in his heart.
hadith:kibr-atom.score_notes: Unforgettable definition of kibr — connects to istakbara.

hadith:kibr-cloak.english: Greatness is My cloak and majesty is My garment.
hadith:kibr-cloak.score_notes: kibriya' belongs to Allah exclusively — powerful.

hadith:twelve-angels.arabic: اللهُ أَكْبَرُ كَبِيرًا وَالْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ كَثِيرًا
hadith:twelve-angels.english: Allah is the Greatest, greatly, and all praise to Allah, abundantly.
hadith:twelve-angels.score_notes: akbar + kabiran together — twelve angels rushed to record it, gates of heaven opened. Beautiful story.

hadith:sea-foam.english: Whoever glorifies Allah... and magnifies Allah — sins forgiven like foam of the sea.
hadith:sea-foam.score_notes: Has kabbara (Form II) — powerful reward image.
